input: CircuitBreaker initialized without provider kwarg — retry storm detection cannot attribute which adapter triggered the breaker open. Retries 50x storm without provider context.
reference: Session 22 Gap #4 fix; _breaker.py __init__ provider kwarg; ADR-040 §breaker
notes: Regression from Gap #4: CircuitBreaker.__init__ lacked provider parameter. Without it, breaker-opened audit events cannot be attributed to the correct adapter.
